chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-306 of 2022 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 1311/2022 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case. 08-08-2024. Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed Junejo advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Habib Khan, advocate for respondents. Mr. Dareshani Ali Hyder “Ada” DAG. ******** The counsel for the petitioner states that respondents are unnecessarily harassing the petitioner by placing the reliance on an order available at page No. 11, which even does not, mention the petitioner’s property. This petition is disposed of with directions that the petitioner may not be dispossessed from the property or even harassed except as an outcome of legal proceedings. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
